questions.question: Which church does Jesus say is neither hot nor cold?
questions.feedback: Laodicea is lukewarm — neither hot nor cold.

questions.question: Which church does Jesus say has an open door that no one can shut?
questions.feedback: Jesus has placed before Philadelphia an open door that no one can shut.

questions.question: Jesus says the church in Sardis has a reputation for being alive but is actually dead.
questions.feedback: Sardis has a reputation for being alive but is dead.

questions.question: Here I am! I stand at the _____ and knock.
questions.feedback: Jesus stands at the door and knocks — if anyone hears and opens, he will come in.

questions.question: Jesus counsels the Laodiceans to buy from him gold refined in the _____.
questions.feedback: Buy gold refined in the fire so you can become rich.
